stemHtml:
Which of the following are the basic functionalities of RNAV and RNP specifications?

1) Indicated airspeed or time to the (TO) next waypoint
2) Appropriate Indication/Display to show inaccuracy of RNAV or RNP
3) Distance or bearing from the previous waypoint
4) Continuous monitor of lateral deviation
5) Groundspeed or time to the (TO) next waypoint
6) Distance or bearing to the (TO) next waypoint
